description_long: This is an ornate chandelier with eight curved arms radiating symmetrically from a central stem, each arm supporting a bell-shaped lamp holder. The arms are elegantly arched and appear to be made of a glossy, possibly glass or polished metal material, giving the fixture a luxurious and reflective appearance. Each lamp holder is topped with a ribbed, translucent shade that diffuses light and adds a decorative touch. The central column is slender and vertically elongated, connecting to a ceiling mount at the top. The overall design is classic and sophisticated, suitable for upscale urban interiors such as hotel lobbies, theaters, or banquet halls. The chandelier's structure is open and airy, with ample space between the arms and shades, enhancing its visual lightness.
description: An elegant chandelier with eight curved arms, each holding a ribbed, translucent shade, and a glossy, reflective finish. The design is classic and ornate, ideal for upscale ceiling installations.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of eight arms and the ribbed shades, with the central stem clearly visible.
description_view_1: Direct head-on view highlighting the even spacing of the arms and the uniformity of the lamp holders and shades.
description_view_2: Side-angled view revealing the curvature of the arms and the depth between the central stem and the outer shades.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, emphasizing the symmetry and the open, airy structure of the chandelier.
